cases.title: TS-22: Student check-in with coordinates within session gpsRadiusMeters passes radius verification
preconditions: Active session with room GPS (10.762622, 106.660172) and gpsRadiusMeters 100
Authenticated enrolled Student with Pending attendance
Valid unexpired QrToken from GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/qr/current
Student device coordinates inside radius (10.762700, 106.660200)
TestClock within attendance window; spoofMetadata.mockLocationDetected false
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with tokenId, latitude 10.762700, longitude 106.660200 using Student session
Assert HTTP status 200 and outcome Success
Assert attendance.status Present in response
Query check_in_attempts for latest attempt and assert outcome Success with distance_meters ≤ 100
Verify GeoVerificationService radius check passed per BR-02 before attendance update
cases.expected: FR-08 satisfied: server computes Haversine distance ≤ session radius; check-in succeeds when all other pipeline rules pass

cases.title: TS-23: Coordinates outside configured radius return OutOfRadius without Present attendance
preconditions: Active session with room GPS (10.762622, 106.660172) and gpsRadiusMeters 100
Authenticated enrolled Student with Pending attendance
Valid unexpired QrToken
Student coordinates outside radius (~167 m north: 10.764122, 106.660172)
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with tokenId, latitude 10.764122, longitude 106.660172 using Student session
Assert HTTP status 400
Assert response outcome OutOfRadius and errorCode OutOfRadius
Assert localized message contains Bạn đang ngoài phạm vi phòng học per API design §6.2
Query attendance_records for studentId and sessionId and assert status remains Pending (not Present)
Query check_in_attempts and assert outcome OutOfRadius with distance_meters logged (no raw lat/lng persisted)
cases.expected: FR-08 rejects check-in when Haversine distance > gpsRadiusMeters; attendance not set to Present per BR-02

cases.title: TS-24: Missing GPS coordinates on check-in submit returns GpsDisabled before radius check
preconditions: Active session with valid room GPS and enrolled authenticated Student
Valid unexpired QrToken
Request body omits latitude/longitude (client GPS unavailable per BR-12)
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with tokenId only (no latitude/longitude fields) using Student session
Assert HTTP status 400
Assert response outcome GpsDisabled and errorCode GpsDisabled
Assert message Vui lòng bật GPS và cấp quyền định vị để điểm danh per AC-08c
Query attendance_records and assert status remains Pending
Verify check-in pipeline short-circuits at step 11 (before BR-02 radius evaluation) per validation-rules §5.1
cases.expected: FR-08 server path: GPS disabled or permission denied rejects with GpsDisabled before radius check; no Present attendance

cases.title: TS-25: Successful radius-validated check-in does not persist raw latitude/longitude in attendance tables
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL test database running
Active session, enrolled student, Valid QrToken, Pending attendance
CheckInService.submit callable with in-radius coordinates (10.762700, 106.660200)
steps: Inspect attendance_records schema and confirm no latitude/longitude columns per domain model §4 and database design
Invoke CheckInService.submit with valid tokenId and in-radius coordinates
Assert attendance transitions to Present
Query attendance_records row for sessionId and studentId and assert no raw client coordinates stored
Query check_in_attempts for outcome Success and assert distance_meters populated but no raw lat/lng columns
Verify coordinates discarded after validation per FR-08 and NFR-12
cases.expected: FR-08 privacy invariant: raw latitude/longitude used for validation only and not stored in long-term attendance tables; only distance_meters on check_in_attempts

cases.title: GeoVerificationService.verifyLocation computes Haversine distance and withinRadius against session room point
preconditions: GeoVerificationService wired in checkin-qr module per domain model §7.1
Room coordinates (10.762622, 106.660172) and gpsRadiusMeters 100 loaded from Session fixture
ClientGeoMetadata with mockLocationDetected false
steps: Call verifyLocation(roomLat, roomLng, clientLat 10.762700, clientLng 106.660200, radiusMeters 100, metadata)
Assert result.withinRadius true and distanceMeters ≤ 100
Call verifyLocation with outside client coords (10.764122, 106.660172)
Assert result.withinRadius false and distanceMeters > 100
Assert client coordinates exist only in memory during call (not written to DB)
cases.expected: GeoVerificationService enforces FR-08 Haversine ≤ gpsRadiusMeters at module boundary; coordinates not persisted during computation

cases.title: CheckInService GpsNotPersisted: PostgreSQL transaction marks Present without writing client coordinates
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with Active session, enrollment, Valid QrToken, Pending attendance
CheckInService orchestrates GeoVerificationService then serializable transaction per domain model §5.2
steps: Record beforeState: attendance Pending, no Present row with coordinate fields
Invoke CheckInService.submit with in-radius locationPayload (latitude 10.762700, longitude 106.660200)
Query attendance_records and assert afterState Present with checkedInAt set
Assert attendance_records and related long-term tables contain no latitude or longitude values
Query check_in_attempts and assert distance_meters is numeric and spoof_flags present where applicable
cases.expected: Module-integration GpsNotPersisted suite per testing-plan §5: FR-08 coordinates used for validation only then discarded at DB boundary

cases.title: OutOfRadius rejection leaves Attendance Pending per SM-04 retryable outcomes
preconditions: Pending attendance_records row in PostgreSQL for enrolled student and Active session
Valid QrToken; CheckInService.submit callable with out-of-radius coordinates
steps: Record beforeState Attendance status Pending
Invoke CheckInService.submit with outside-radius coordinates (10.764122, 106.660172)
Assert CheckInAttempt outcome OutOfRadius inserted
Query attendance_records and assert afterState remains Pending (not Present or Absent)
Verify SM-04 per 07-state-machines.md: OutOfRadius allows student retry after moving within radius
cases.expected: beforeState Pending; afterState Pending on OutOfRadius; FR-08 failure does not finalize attendance — student may retry

cases.title: POST /check-in with in-radius coordinates returns 200 Success envelope after GPS verification
preconditions: Authenticated enrolled Student session cookie set
Active sessionId with Valid QrToken and in-radius coordinates available
steps: Send POST /api/v1/check-in with body { tokenId, latitude: 10.762700, longitude: 106.660200, spoofMetadata: { mockLocationDetected: false, platform: "android" } }
Assert HTTP status 200
Assert Content-Type application/json; charset=utf-8
Assert response outcome Success and attendance.status Present
Assert no errorCode field on success per API design §6.2
cases.expected: HTTP 200 Success contract when FR-08 GPS within radius and all pipeline steps pass

cases.title: POST /check-in with out-of-radius coordinates returns 400 OutOfRadius envelope
preconditions: Authenticated enrolled Student session
Active session with gpsRadiusMeters 100 and room (10.762622, 106.660172)
Valid unexpired QrToken
Outside coordinates (10.764122, 106.660172)
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with tokenId and outside-radius latitude/longitude
Assert HTTP status 400
Assert response body outcome OutOfRadius and errorCode OutOfRadius
Assert message field contains Vietnamese out-of-radius guidance per §6.3 mapping
Assert no attendance Present in response body
cases.expected: HTTP 400 OutOfRadius per API design §6.3; canonical failure envelope for FR-08 radius rejection

cases.title: POST /check-in without coordinates returns 400 GpsDisabled envelope
preconditions: Authenticated enrolled Student session
Active session with Valid QrToken
Request body missing latitude and longitude (simulates client GPS disabled)
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with body { tokenId } only (no latitude/longitude)
Assert HTTP status 400
Assert response outcome GpsDisabled and errorCode GpsDisabled
Assert message Vui lòng bật GPS và cấp quyền định vị để điểm danh
cases.expected: HTTP 400 GpsDisabled per API design §6.3; FR-08 BR-12 enforced before radius check

cases.title: Session gpsRadiusMeters override 200 m accepts student at ~167 m from room point
preconditions: Active session with room (10.762622, 106.660172) and gpsRadiusMeters 200 (instructor override per FR-04)
Authenticated enrolled Student with coordinates (10.764122, 106.660172) ~167 m from room
Valid unexpired QrToken; all non-GPS pipeline checks pass
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with tokenId and coordinates (10.764122, 106.660172)
Assert HTTP status 200 outcome Success (would fail with default 100 m radius)
Assert attendance Present
Verify distance ~167 m ≤ 200 m override radius
cases.expected: FR-08 honors session-specific gpsRadiusMeters override: distance ≤ configured radius (not only default 100 m) per BR-02

cases.title: GPS at Haversine boundary distance equal to gpsRadiusMeters passes radius check
preconditions: Active session with room (10.762622, 106.660172) and gpsRadiusMeters 100
Client coordinates at ~100 m from room point (10.763520, 106.660172) per geo fixture math
Authenticated enrolled Student, Valid QrToken, Pending attendance
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with boundary coordinates (10.763520, 106.660172)
Assert HTTP status 200 outcome Success
Assert distanceMeters on check_in_attempts ≤ 100 (inclusive boundary per HaversineDistance unit tests)
Contrast: coordinates at 10.764122 (~167 m) with same session assert 400 OutOfRadius
cases.expected: FR-08 uses ≤ comparison; student at exactly radius boundary passes; just outside fails — boundary invariant for geo verification

cases.title: Invalid latitude/longitude schema values rejected before radius evaluation
preconditions: Authenticated enrolled Student session
Active session with Valid QrToken
Request body with latitude 91.0 (out of −90 to 90 range) and valid longitude
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with tokenId, latitude 91.0, longitude 106.660200 using Student session
Assert HTTP status 400 or 422 with schema validation error (InvalidFormat or equivalent)
Assert response does not contain outcome OutOfRadius (radius check not reached)
Repeat with longitude 181.0 and valid latitude; assert same schema rejection
Verify attendance remains Pending
cases.expected: FR-08 inputs validated at Layer 1 per validation-rules §3.6 (−90 to 90 lat, −180 to 180 lng); invalid coordinates rejected before Haversine computation

cases.title: Flow A step 4: GPS coordinates within radius complete workshop check-in verification
preconditions: Flow A steps 1–3 complete: roster seeded, session opened Active with room GPS, QR token polled
Authenticated enrolled Student session established
Student coordinates within session gpsRadiusMeters (10.762700, 106.660200)
tokenId extracted from qrPayload returned in step 3
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with tokenId from Flow A step 3 and in-radius latitude/longitude using Student session
Assert HTTP 200 outcome Success with attendance Present
Query check_in_attempts and assert distance_meters ≤ session gpsRadiusMeters
Verify no raw lat/lng persisted in attendance or attempt tables
cases.expected: Flow A happy-path includes FR-08 GPS radius verification before Present attendance in workshop lifecycle

cases.title: Instructor denied POST /check-in with GPS payload (lacks checkin:submit)
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor session available
Active session with valid room GPS and QrToken
Instructor role lacks checkin:submit per roles-permissions §2.2
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with valid tokenId and in-radius coordinates using Instructor session
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden and errorCode Forbidden
Verify no GPS radius evaluation creates Present attendance for instructor userId
Assert permission guard runs before Layer 4 domain GPS checks per validation pipeline step 3
cases.expected: FR-08 actor is Student only; GPS verification endpoint restricted via checkin:submit; Instructor cannot submit coordinates

cases.title: Mobile check-in journey: GPS permission granted and in-radius coordinates enable successful submit
preconditions: Authenticated Student on mobile viewport 375×812 (iOS Safari or Android Chrome)
Active session check-in deep link /check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId
Browser geolocation granted with in-radius mock coordinates (10.762700, 106.660200)
steps: Navigate to check-in page on mobile viewport after preflight returns outcome Valid
Verify GpsCaptureStep reaches ready substate: Vị trí đã sẵn sàng without Spinner; aria-busy false per AC-08f
Tap submit control (Xác nhận điểm danh)
Verify success panel with Present status after server radius validation passes
Verify no raw GPS coordinates displayed in UI beyond transient capture state
cases.expected: FR-08 mobile web path: client requests geolocation permission via navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition, sends coordinates, server validates radius, success confirmation shown

cases.title: Mobile check-in OutOfRadius outcome panel shows Vietnamese message and retry guidance
preconditions: Authenticated Student on mobile viewport with GPS permission granted
Active session check-in deep link with valid token
Browser geolocation mocked to outside-radius coordinates (10.764122, 106.660172)
steps: Navigate to /check-in page and wait for GPS capture with outside coordinates
Submit check-in
Verify outcome panel displays OutOfRadius state with message Bạn đang ngoài phạm vi phòng học
Verify distance hint or move-closer guidance visible per user-flows §3
Verify no Present success badge; student can retry after moving closer
cases.expected: FR-08 OutOfRadius outcome surfaced in mobile UI with localized message and recovery action

cases.title: GPS permission denied shows GpsDisabled UX with help link without API call within 15 s timeout
preconditions: Authenticated Student on mobile viewport 375×812
Active session check-in deep link with valid token
Browser geolocation permission denied or GPS disabled in device settings
Playwright geolocation permission set to denied
steps: Navigate to /check-in page
Wait up to 15 seconds for geolocation timeout per validation-rules §6
Verify GpsDisabled outcome panel displays Vui lòng bật GPS và cấp quyền định vị để điểm danh
Verify Hướng dẫn cấp quyền or PermissionGuideModal link to device settings per AC-08c
Assert no POST /check-in network request sent while GPS unavailable (client-side gate)
After granting permission and in-radius coords, verify student can retry successfully
cases.expected: FR-08 client path: permission denied or 15 s timeout shows GpsDisabled Vietnamese message with help link; no server call until coordinates available

cases.title: check_in_attempts stores distance_meters but never raw client latitude/longitude after radius validation
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL; successful check-in transaction completed via CheckInService
check_in_attempts table schema per database design §checkin-qr
steps: Complete successful check-in with in-radius coordinates via integration harness
SELECT columns from check_in_attempts for the attempt row
Assert distance_meters is NOT NULL and within expected range
Assert no latitude or longitude columns exist or are populated on check_in_attempts or attendance_records
Verify privacy baseline NFR-12: coordinates used only in request handler memory
cases.expected: FR-08 and NFR-12 enforced at persistence layer: distance logged for audit without long-term coordinate storage

cases.title: Check-in flow invokes getUserMedia and geolocation APIs when device simulation flag off
preconditions: Web build with VITE_ENABLE_DEVICE_SIMULATION=false (production default)
Authenticated enrolled Student on mobile viewport at /check-in/scan
Instrument page to record navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia and navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition calls
URL query params gpsSim and cameraSim present but must be ignored per NFR-24
steps: Open /check-in/scan and trigger QR scanner mount
Assert getUserMedia called with video constraints facingMode environment; synthetic camera layer not used
Complete scan and preflight pass to mount GpsCaptureStep
Assert navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition invoked (not URL gpsSim override)
Verify gpsSim query param did not bypass real geolocation API on GPS step
cases.expected: FR-08 default path: real getUserMedia for QR scan and navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition for GPS when simulation flag off; URL sim params ignored per AC-08e and NFR-24

cases.title: TS-21e: GpsCaptureStep ready substate hides spinner and enables submit per ui-states §4.2
preconditions: Authenticated enrolled Student on mobile viewport
Valid token deep link; GET /check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight returns 200 outcome Valid
Geolocation resolves in-radius coordinates (gpsState transitions to ready)
steps: Navigate to /check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId and wait for preflight pass
Wait for GpsCaptureStep substate ready after coordinates acquired
Assert no spinner visible in GPS step region
Assert check icon and text Vị trí đã sẵn sàng displayed
Assert submit region aria-busy is false
Assert Xác nhận điểm danh button enabled immediately
Verify sessionGate checking in parallel does not restore spinner once ready per FR-08 behavior
cases.expected: AC-08f satisfied: GPS ready-state UX per ui-states §4.2 and event-specific-components §2.2 — static check icon, no spinner, submit enabled when coordinates acquired

cases.title: GpsCaptureStep submitting substate shows spinner and disables submit until API outcome
preconditions: Authenticated enrolled Student on mobile viewport
Valid token deep link; preflight passed; GpsCaptureStep in ready state with in-radius coordinates
Mocked geolocation granted or VITE_ENABLE_DEVICE_SIMULATION=true with gpsSim=delay for harness
steps: Navigate to check-in page and wait for GpsCaptureStep ready state (Vị trí đã sẵn sàng)
Tap Xác nhận điểm danh submit control
Assert GpsCaptureStep enters submitting substate with spinner visible
Assert copy Đang gửi điểm danh… displayed
Assert submit region aria-busy is true and submit button disabled
Wait for POST /check-in response and assert transition to CheckInOutcomePanel with radius-validated outcome
cases.expected: AC-08g satisfied: submit in flight shows spinner and disables submit until API returns outcome per ui-states §4.2 submitting row

cases.title: PreflightService read-only chain validates token Valid, session Active, and enrollment before GPS step
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with Active session, Valid qr_tokens row, and enrolled studentId
PreflightService wired to QrTokenRepository, SessionRepository, and EnrollmentRepository per module-breakdown §checkin-qr
beforeState: qr_token status Valid, attendance status Pending, no check_in_attempts row for this preflight call
steps: Invoke PreflightService.validate(tokenId, studentId) against enrolled student
Assert result outcome Valid with session summary (classCode, subjectCode, roomName, status Active)
Query qr_tokens for tokenId and assert status remains Valid (not Consumed)
Query attendance_records and assert status remains Pending
Verify no INSERT or UPDATE executed during preflight (read-only per validation-rules §3.6a)
cases.expected: FR-08 prerequisite gate: preflight read-only chain confirms token Valid, parent session Active, student enrolled; no side effects before GPS capture and radius verification

cases.title: gpsSim query params ignored when VITE_ENABLE_DEVICE_SIMULATION=false
preconditions: Web build compiled with VITE_ENABLE_DEVICE_SIMULATION=false (production default)
Authenticated enrolled Student session
Active session with valid QrToken; GET /check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight returns 200
Check-in deep link includes gpsSim=delay and gpsLat/gpsLng in-room coordinates
steps: Load /check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId&gpsSim=delay&gpsLat=10.762700&gpsLng=106.660200 with simulation flag off
Verify client does not auto-resolve simulated coordinates from query params
Verify browser geolocation API is invoked (or permission prompt shown) instead of simulation layer
Without granting real GPS, assert check-in cannot proceed to success solely from gpsSim params
Grant mocked geolocation in harness and complete successful POST /check-in with in-radius coords
cases.expected: AC-08e satisfied: production builds ignore gpsSim URL params; client uses real navigator.geolocation per NFR-24 and local-development-setup §simulation
